name: corezoid
description: Corezoid BPM platform assistant. Exposes Corezoid operations as an MCP server and provides skills for creating, editing, reviewing, and deploying business processes.

interface.shortDescription: Create, edit, and deploy Corezoid BPM processes via natural conversation
interface.longDescription: Full access to the Corezoid BPM platform — pull and push processes, lint and validate JSON, run tasks, manage folders, and create environment variables. Specialist skills cover process creation, editing, review, and project-wide auditing.
capabilities: Create and deploy BPM processes as .conv.json files
Pull and push processes to Corezoid workspace
Lint and validate process structure locally
Run and inspect tasks on deployed processes
Manage folders, aliases, and environment variables
defaultPrompt: Pull my Corezoid workspace and show the process list
Create a process that calls an external API and handles errors
Review the payment process for validation errors
